content.json:
# Azure WAF Triage Solution
---
This workbook uses an **evidence-based Tuning Priority score** to identify WAF tuning candidates from diagnostic logs. It traces blocked transactions back to contributing `Matched` rules, groups recurring selector-level patterns, scores confidence using breadth/recurrence/concentration signals, and lets operators apply reviewed changes from the workbook.

parameters.name: workspace
parameters.label: Workspace
parameters.query:
where type =~ 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces'
| summarize by id, name
| project id

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == "ApplicationGatewayFirewallLog"
| where TimeGenerated {detectionTime}
| where action_s in ({actionFilter})
| extend Id = new_guid()
| project-reorder Id, ResourceId, policyScopeName_s, action_s
| evaluate pivot(action_s, count(), ResourceId, policyScopeName_s)
content.title: Step 1 — Select listener scope (click a row)

parameters.name: wafPolicyName
parameters.label: WAF Policy
parameters.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.network/applicationgateways'
| where id =~ '{ResourceId}'
| extend gwPol = tostring(properties.firewallPolicy.id)
| mv-expand listener = properties.httpListeners
| extend listenerName = tostring(listener.name), listenerPol = tostring(listener.properties.firewallPolicy.id)
| summarize gwPol = take_any(gwPol), listenerPol = max(iff(listenerName =~ '{PolicyScope}', listenerPol, ''))
| extend resolvedPol = iff(isnotempty(listenerPol), listenerPol, gwPol)
| project value = tostring(split(resolvedPol, '/')[8]), label = tostring(split(resolvedPol, '/')[8]), selected = true

parameters.name: wafPolicyRG
parameters.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.network/applicationgateways'
| where id =~ '{ResourceId}'
| extend gwPol = tostring(properties.firewallPolicy.id)
| mv-expand listener = properties.httpListeners
| extend listenerName = tostring(listener.name), listenerPol = tostring(listener.properties.firewallPolicy.id)
| summarize gwPol = take_any(gwPol), listenerPol = max(iff(listenerName =~ '{PolicyScope}', listenerPol, ''))
| extend resolvedPol = iff(isnotempty(listenerPol), listenerPol, gwPol)
| project value = tostring(split(resolvedPol, '/')[4]), label = tostring(split(resolvedPol, '/')[4]), selected = true

parameters.name: wafPolicyId
parameters.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.network/applicationgateways'
| where id =~ '{ResourceId}'
| extend gwPol = tostring(properties.firewallPolicy.id)
| mv-expand listener = properties.httpListeners
| extend listenerName = tostring(listener.name), listenerPol = tostring(listener.properties.firewallPolicy.id)
| summarize gwPol = take_any(gwPol), listenerPol = max(iff(listenerName =~ '{PolicyScope}', listenerPol, ''))
| extend resolvedPol = iff(isnotempty(listenerPol), listenerPol, gwPol)
| project value = resolvedPol, label = resolvedPol, selected = true

content.json:
ℹ️ **Scope precedence:** When a WAF policy is assigned at both the gateway level (*Global*) and an individual listener, the **listener-level policy takes precedence**. WAF logs will only record hits against the listener scope; the Global row will show 0 hits in that case.

### 🛡️ Selected WAF Policy: **{wafPolicyName}**
| | |
|---|---|
| **Resource Group** | {wafPolicyRG} |

## Detected Tuning Candidates
This view uses **anomaly scoring awareness** and an **evidence-based Tuning Priority score**. It traces blocked transactions back to contributing `Matched` rules, groups candidates by (Rule, MatchVariable, Selector), then scores each pattern using transaction evidence, breadth, recurrence, source/URI concentration, selector quality, and mitigation safety.

Mandatory blocking-evaluation rules (949/959/980) are automatically filtered out since they cannot be excluded.

> Select a row to see the impact preview, then click **Create Exclusion** or **Disable Rule** after reviewing the evidence.

content.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.network/applicationgatewaywebapplicationfirewallpolicies'
| where id =~ '{wafPolicyId}'
| mv-expand exclusion = properties.managedRules.exclusions
| extend MatchVariable = tostring(exclusion.matchVariable),
    Operator = tostring(exclusion.selectorMatchOperator),
    Selector = tostring(exclusion.selector),
    Scope = iff(array_length(exclusion.exclusionManagedRuleSets) > 0, 'Per-Rule', 'Global')
| mv-expand ruleSet = exclusion.exclusionManagedRuleSets
| mv-expand ruleGroup = ruleSet.ruleGroups
| mv-expand rule = ruleGroup.rules
| project MatchVariable, Operator, Selector, Scope,
    RuleSetType = tostring(ruleSet.ruleSetType),
    RuleSetVersion = tostring(ruleSet.ruleSetVersion),
    RuleGroupName = tostring(ruleGroup.ruleGroupName),
    RuleId = tostring(rule.ruleId)
content.title: ✅ Existing exclusions on this WAF policy (already configured)
content.noDataMessage: No exclusions configured yet on this WAF policy.

content.query:
// Evidence-based Tuning Priority: trace blocked transactions to contributing Matched rules, then score breadth, recurrence, concentration, selector quality, and mitigation safety
let blockedTxns = AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == "ApplicationGatewayFirewallLog"
| where TimeGenerated {detectionTime}
| where ResourceId == '{ResourceId}' and policyScopeName_s == '{PolicyScope}'
| extend TxnId = coalesce(tostring(column_ifexists("transactionId_g", "")), tostring(column_ifexists("transactionId_s", "")))
| where action_s == "Blocked" and isnotempty(TxnId)
| distinct TxnId;
let parsed = AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == "ApplicationGatewayFirewallLog"
| where TimeGenerated {detectionTime}
| where ResourceId == '{ResourceId}' and policyScopeName_s == '{PolicyScope}'
| extend TxnId = coalesce(tostring(column_ifexists("transactionId_g", "")), tostring(column_ifexists("transactionId_s", "")))
| where (action_s == "Matched" and TxnId in (blockedTxns))
    or (action_s in ({actionFilter}) and ruleId_s != "0")
// Filter out mandatory blocking-evaluation rules (949/959/980) — they cannot be excluded or disabled
| where not(ruleId_s startswith "949") and not(ruleId_s startswith "980") and not(ruleId_s startswith "959")
| where ruleId_s != "0"
| where isnotempty(details_message_s) or isnotempty(details_data_s)
// Parse match variable and selector from BOTH details_message_s and details_data_s
| extend MatchInfo = coalesce(details_message_s, "")
| extend DataInfo = coalesce(details_data_s, "")
| extend LogMatchVariable = coalesce(extract(@'at\s+(\w+)[:\.\s]', 1, MatchInfo), extract(@'\[(\w+):', 1, DataInfo), "")
| extend MatchVariable = case(
    MatchInfo has "ARGS_NAMES", "RequestArgKeys",
    MatchInfo has "REQUEST_COOKIES_NAMES", "RequestCookieKeys",
    MatchInfo has "REQUEST_HEADERS_NAMES", "RequestHeaderKeys",
    MatchInfo matches regex @'ARGS_GET[:\.]', "RequestArgValues",
    MatchInfo matches regex @'ARGS_POST[:\.]', "RequestArgValues",
    MatchInfo matches regex @'ARGS[:\.]', "RequestArgValues",
    MatchInfo matches regex @'REQUEST_HEADERS[:\.]', "RequestHeaderValues",
    MatchInfo matches regex @'REQUEST_COOKIES[:\.]', "RequestCookieValues",
    MatchInfo has "REQUEST_BODY", "RequestArgValues",
    MatchInfo has "REQUEST_URI", "DisableRule",
    MatchInfo has "REQUEST_BASENAME", "DisableRule",
    MatchInfo has "REQUEST_FILENAME", "DisableRule",
    MatchInfo has "MULTIPART_STRICT_ERROR", "DisableRule",
    MatchInfo has "REQUEST_METHOD", "DisableRule",
    MatchInfo has "REQUEST_PROTOCOL", "DisableRule",
    MatchInfo has "XML:", "DisableRule",
    DataInfo matches regex @'\[ARGS_NAMES:', "RequestArgKeys",
    DataInfo matches regex @'\[REQUEST_COOKIES_NAMES:', "RequestCookieKeys",
    DataInfo matches regex @'\[REQUEST_HEADERS_NAMES:', "RequestHeaderKeys",
    DataInfo matches regex @'\[ARGS_GET:', "RequestArgValues",
    DataInfo matches regex @'\[ARGS_POST:', "RequestArgValues",
    DataInfo matches regex @'\[ARGS:', "RequestArgValues",
    DataInfo matches regex @'\[REQUEST_HEADERS:', "RequestHeaderValues",
    DataInfo matches regex @'\[REQUEST_COOKIES:', "RequestCookieValues",
    DataInfo has "REQUEST_BODY", "RequestArgValues",
    DataInfo has "REQUEST_URI", "DisableRule",
    DataInfo has "REQUEST_BASENAME", "DisableRule",
    DataInfo has "REQUEST_FILENAME", "DisableRule",
    DataInfo has "XML:", "DisableRule",
    "")
| extend Selector = case(
    isnotempty(extract(@'ARGS_NAMES:([^\s\.\):]+)', 1, MatchInfo)), extract(@'ARGS_NAMES:([^\s\.\):]+)', 1, MatchInfo),
    isnotempty(extract(@'ARGS_GET:([^\s\.\):]+)', 1, MatchInfo)), extract(@'ARGS_GET:([^\s\.\):]+)', 1, MatchInfo),
    isnotempty(extract(@'ARGS_POST:([^\s\.\):]+)', 1, MatchInfo)), extract(@'ARGS_POST:([^\s\.\):]+)', 1, MatchInfo),
    isnotempty(extract(@'ARGS:([^\s\.\):]+)', 1, MatchInfo)), extract(@'ARGS:([^\s\.\):]+)', 1, MatchInfo),
    isnotempty(extract(@'REQUEST_HEADERS_NAMES:([^\s\.\):]+)', 1, MatchInfo)), extract(@'REQUEST_HEADERS_NAMES:([^\s\.\):]+)', 1, MatchInfo),
    isnotempty(extract(@'REQUEST_HEADERS:([^\s\.\):]+)', 1, MatchInfo)), extract(@'REQUEST_HEADERS:([^\s\.\):]+)', 1, MatchInfo),
    isnotempty(extract(@'REQUEST_COOKIES_NAMES:([^\s\.\):]+)', 1, MatchInfo)), extract(@'REQUEST_COOKIES_NAMES:([^\s\.\):]+)', 1, MatchInfo),
    isnotempty(extract(@'REQUEST_COOKIES:([^\s\.\):]+)', 1, MatchInfo)), extract(@'REQUEST_COOKIES:([^\s\.\):]+)', 1, MatchInfo),
    isnotempty(extract(@'REQUEST_BODY:([^\s\.\):]+)', 1, MatchInfo)), extract(@'REQUEST_BODY:([^\s\.\):]+)', 1, MatchInfo),
    isnotempty(extract(@'\[ARGS_NAMES:([^\]:\s\]]+)', 1, DataInfo)), extract(@'\[ARGS_NAMES:([^\]:\s\]]+)', 1, DataInfo),
    isnotempty(extract(@'\[ARGS_GET:([^\]:\s\]]+)', 1, DataInfo)), extract(@'\[ARGS_GET:([^\]:\s\]]+)', 1, DataInfo),
    isnotempty(extract(@'\[ARGS_POST:([^\]:\s\]]+)', 1, DataInfo)), extract(@'\[ARGS_POST:([^\]:\s\]]+)', 1, DataInfo),
    isnotempty(extract(@'\[ARGS:([^\]:\s\]]+)', 1, DataInfo)), extract(@'\[ARGS:([^\]:\s\]]+)', 1, DataInfo),
    isnotempty(extract(@'\[REQUEST_HEADERS_NAMES:([^\]:\s\]]+)', 1, DataInfo)), extract(@'\[REQUEST_HEADERS_NAMES:([^\]:\s\]]+)', 1, DataInfo),
    isnotempty(extract(@'\[REQUEST_HEADERS:([^\]:\s\]]+)', 1, DataInfo)), extract(@'\[REQUEST_HEADERS:([^\]:\s\]]+)', 1, DataInfo),
    isnotempty(extract(@'\[REQUEST_COOKIES_NAMES:([^\]:\s\]]+)', 1, DataInfo)), extract(@'\[REQUEST_COOKIES_NAMES:([^\]:\s\]]+)', 1, DataInfo),
    isnotempty(extract(@'\[REQUEST_COOKIES:([^\]:\s\]]+)', 1, DataInfo)), extract(@'\[REQUEST_COOKIES:([^\]:\s\]]+)', 1, DataInfo),
    isnotempty(extract(@'\[REQUEST_BODY:([^\]:\s\]]+)', 1, DataInfo)), extract(@'\[REQUEST_BODY:([^\]:\s\]]+)', 1, DataInfo),
    "")
| extend ActionType = iff(MatchVariable == "DisableRule", "disableRule", "createExclusion")
| where isnotempty(MatchVariable) and (MatchVariable == "DisableRule" or isnotempty(Selector))
// Filter out selectors that are clearly attack payloads (XSS, injection)
| where MatchVariable == "DisableRule" or (Selector !contains "<" and Selector !contains ">" and Selector !contains "script" and Selector !contains "alert(" and Selector !contains ";" and Selector !contains "/")
| extend NormRuleSetType = case(ruleSetType_s has "OWASP", "OWASP", ruleSetType_s)
| extend IsBlockedTxn = TxnId in (blockedTxns);
let base = parsed
| summarize
    HitCount = count(),
    UniqueTransactions = dcount(TxnId),
    BlockedTransactions = dcountif(TxnId, IsBlockedTxn),
    MatchedTransactions = dcountif(TxnId, action_s == "Matched"),
    DetectedTransactions = dcountif(TxnId, action_s == "Detected"),
    URIs = dcount(requestUri_s),
    IPs = dcount(clientIp_s),
    Hosts = dcount(hostname_s),
    ActiveHours = dcount(bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)),
    ActiveDays = dcount(startofday(TimeGenerated)),
    SampleURIs = make_set(requestUri_s, 5),
    SampleData = make_set(details_data_s, 3),
    WindowStart = min(TimeGenerated),
    WindowEnd = max(TimeGenerated),
    RuleGroup = take_any(ruleGroup_s),
    RuleSetVersion = take_any(ruleSetVersion_s),
    NormRuleSetType = take_any(NormRuleSetType),
    SampleMsg = take_any(Message),
    LogMatchVariable = take_any(LogMatchVariable),
    ActionType = take_any(ActionType)
    by ruleId_s, MatchVariable, Selector;
let ipConcentration = parsed
| summarize IPHits = count() by ruleId_s, MatchVariable, Selector, clientIp_s
| summarize TopIPHits = max(IPHits) by ruleId_s, MatchVariable, Selector;
let uriConcentration = parsed
| summarize URIHits = count() by ruleId_s, MatchVariable, Selector, requestUri_s
| summarize TopURIHits = max(URIHits) by ruleId_s, MatchVariable, Selector;
base
| join kind=leftouter ipConcentration on ruleId_s, MatchVariable, Selector
| join kind=leftouter uriConcentration on ruleId_s, MatchVariable, Selector
| extend TopIPShare = iff(HitCount == 0, 0.0, round(todouble(TopIPHits) / todouble(HitCount), 2)),
         TopURIShare = iff(HitCount == 0, 0.0, round(todouble(TopURIHits) / todouble(HitCount), 2))
| extend WindowHours = max_of(1, datetime_diff('hour', WindowEnd, WindowStart)),
         WindowDays = max_of(1, datetime_diff('day', WindowEnd, WindowStart))
| extend HoursRatio = round(todouble(ActiveHours) / todouble(WindowHours), 2),
         DaysRatio = round(todouble(ActiveDays) / todouble(WindowDays), 2),
         DailyRate = round(todouble(UniqueTransactions) / todouble(max_of(1, ActiveDays)), 1)
| extend TraceScore = case(BlockedTransactions > 0 and MatchedTransactions > 0, 15, BlockedTransactions > 0, 10, DetectedTransactions > 0, 5, 0)
| extend DailyURIs = round(todouble(URIs) / todouble(max_of(1, ActiveDays)), 1),
         DailyIPs = round(todouble(IPs) / todouble(max_of(1, ActiveDays)), 1)
| extend BreadthScore = case(DailyURIs > 10 and DailyIPs > 3, 25, DailyURIs > 5 or DailyIPs > 2, 18, DailyURIs > 2, 10, DailyURIs > 1, 5, 0)
| extend RecurrenceScore = case(HoursRatio > 0.50 and DaysRatio >= 0.50, 10, HoursRatio > 0.25, 7, HoursRatio > 0.10, 3, 0)
| extend ConcentrationScore = case(TopIPShare <= 0.20 and TopURIShare <= 0.30, 20, TopIPShare <= 0.35 and TopURIShare <= 0.50, 14, TopIPShare <= 0.60 and TopURIShare <= 0.75, 7, 0)
| extend SelectorScore = case(MatchVariable == "DisableRule", 1, isnotempty(Selector) and strlen(Selector) <= 80, 5, isnotempty(Selector), 3, 0)
| extend MitigationScore = iff(ActionType == "createExclusion", 5, 1)
| extend VolumeScore = case(DailyRate > 50, 20, DailyRate > 20, 15, DailyRate > 10, 10, DailyRate > 3, 5, 0)
| extend ConfidenceScoreRaw = TraceScore + BreadthScore + RecurrenceScore + ConcentrationScore + SelectorScore + MitigationScore + VolumeScore
| extend ConfidenceScore = iff(ActionType == "disableRule" and ConfidenceScoreRaw > 79, 79, ConfidenceScoreRaw)
| extend Confidence = case(
    ConfidenceScore >= 85, "⭐ Very High",
    ConfidenceScore >= 70, "🟠 High",
    ConfidenceScore >= 50, "🟡 Medium",
    "⚪ Low")
| extend ConfidenceReason = strcat(
    "Trace ", TraceScore, "/15; Breadth ", BreadthScore, "/25; Recurrence ", RecurrenceScore, "/10; Concentration ", ConcentrationScore, "/20; Selector ", SelectorScore, "/5; Mitigation ", MitigationScore, "/5; Volume ", VolumeScore, "/20")
| extend Blocks = HitCount
| extend Coverage = Confidence
| extend CreateAction = iff(ActionType == "disableRule", "🚫 Disable Rule", "➕ Create Exclusion")
| project ruleId_s, MatchVariable, Selector, RuleGroup, NormRuleSetType, RuleSetVersion, ActionType, CreateAction, Confidence, FPScore = ConfidenceScore, ScoreBreakdown = ConfidenceReason, HitCount, Blocks, UniqueTransactions, BlockedTransactions, MatchedTransactions, DetectedTransactions, UriCount = URIs, ClientIPCount = IPs, Hosts, ActiveHours, ActiveDays, TopClientIPShare = TopIPShare, TopRequestURIShare = TopURIShare, SampleMsg, SampleUrls = SampleURIs, SampleData, LogMatchVariable
| order by FPScore desc, HitCount desc
content.title: Step 2 — Tuning candidates ranked by Tuning Priority (click a row to preview/apply)

armActionContext.body:
{
  "action": "{SelectedActionType}",
  "resourceGroupName": "{wafPolicyRG}",
  "wafPolicyName": "{wafPolicyName}",
  "ruleId": "{SelectedRuleId}",
  "ruleGroupName": "{SelectedRuleGroup}",
  "ruleSetType": "{SelectedRuleSetType}",
  "ruleSetVersion": "{SelectedRuleSetVersion}",
  "matchVariable": "{SelectedMatchVar}",
  "selectorMatchOperator": "Equals",
  "selector": "{SelectedSelector}",
  "description": "Auto-created from WAF Triage Workbook: Rule {SelectedRuleId} {SelectedActionType} ({SelectedBlocks} hits, {SelectedURIs} URIs)"
}
armActionContext.title: WAF Policy Change
armActionContext.description:
**Action:** {SelectedActionType}

This will apply a change to WAF policy **{wafPolicyName}**:

| Setting | Value |
|---------|-------|
| Action | {SelectedActionType} |
| Rule ID | {SelectedRuleId} |
| Rule Group | {SelectedRuleGroup} |
| Match Variable | {SelectedMatchVar} |
| Selector | {SelectedSelector} |
| Log Variable | {SelectedLogMatchVar} |

**Impact:** Fixes {SelectedBlocks} hits across {SelectedURIs} URIs

⚠️ This modifies your WAF policy. The change applies immediately.

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == "ApplicationGatewayFirewallLog"
| where TimeGenerated {detectionTime}
| where ResourceId == '{ResourceId}' and policyScopeName_s == '{PolicyScope}'
| where ruleId_s == '{SelectedRuleId}'
| where ("{SelectedSelector}" == "" or details_message_s contains "{SelectedSelector}" or details_data_s contains "{SelectedSelector}")
| project TimeGenerated, hostname_s, requestUri_s, clientIp_s, action_s, details_data_s, details_message_s
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 30
content.title: Blocked requests that would be fixed by this change (sample of up to 30)

content.json:
---
## ✅ Apply WAF Change

Review the details below, then click the button to apply the change automatically.

| Setting | Value |
|---------|-------|
| **Action** | `{SelectedActionType}` |
| **WAF Policy** | `{wafPolicyName}` (RG: `{wafPolicyRG}`) |
| **Rule ID** | `{SelectedRuleId}` |
| **Rule Group** | `{SelectedRuleGroup}` |
| **Rule Set** | `{SelectedRuleSetType}` v`{SelectedRuleSetVersion}` |
| **Log Variable** | `{SelectedLogMatchVar}` |
| **Match Variable** | `{SelectedMatchVar}` |
| **Selector** | `{SelectedSelector}` |
| **Evidence** | **{SelectedBlocks}** hits across **{SelectedURIs}** URIs |

armActionContext.body:
{
  "action": "{SelectedActionType}",
  "resourceGroupName": "{wafPolicyRG}",
  "wafPolicyName": "{wafPolicyName}",
  "ruleId": "{SelectedRuleId}",
  "ruleGroupName": "{SelectedRuleGroup}",
  "ruleSetType": "{SelectedRuleSetType}",
  "ruleSetVersion": "{SelectedRuleSetVersion}",
  "matchVariable": "{SelectedMatchVar}",
  "selectorMatchOperator": "Equals",
  "selector": "{SelectedSelector}",
  "description": "Auto-created from WAF Triage Workbook: Rule {SelectedRuleId} {SelectedActionType} ({SelectedBlocks} hits, {SelectedURIs} URIs)"
}
armActionContext.title: WAF Policy Change
armActionContext.description:
**Action:** {SelectedActionType}

This will apply a change to WAF policy **{wafPolicyName}**:

| Setting | Value |
|---------|-------|
| Action | {SelectedActionType} |
| Rule | {SelectedRuleId} |
| Log Variable | {SelectedLogMatchVar} |
| Match Variable | {SelectedMatchVar} |
| Selector | {SelectedSelector} |

**Impact:** Fixes {SelectedBlocks} hits across {SelectedURIs} URIs

The Logic App will trigger a Runbook that applies the change to your WAF policy. This takes effect immediately.

content.json:
---
### ℹ️ How it works
1. Click **Create Exclusion** or **Disable Rule** on any pattern row (or select a row and use the button below)
2. A confirmation dialog shows you exactly what will be changed
3. Click **Confirm & Apply** to trigger the automation
4. The Logic App starts a Runbook that applies the change to your WAF policy
5. The change takes effect immediately — no App Gateway restart needed

**Actions:**
- **⊕ Create Exclusion** — adds a per-rule exclusion for the specific match variable and selector (e.g., exclude `Host` header from rule 920350)
- **🚫 Disable Rule** — disables the entire rule when the match variable cannot be excluded (e.g., REQUEST_URI, REQUEST_BODY matches)

**Check status:** Open the [Logic App](https://portal.azure.com/#resource{logicApp}/logicApp) to see execution history.

---
### 💡 Anomaly Scoring
Azure WAF uses anomaly scoring: individual rules with `action=Matched` increment a score, and when the total exceeds the threshold, mandatory rules (949/980) issue the `Blocked` action. This workbook automatically traces blocked transactions back to the contributing Matched rules, so you see the **actual rules to exclude** rather than the un-excludable blocking rules.

---
### ⚙️ Global Parameters
Some false positives can also be fixed by adjusting WAF policy settings:
- **Disable request body inspection** — if request bodies are trusted
- **Increase max request body limit** — for apps with large POST payloads
- **Increase file upload limit** — for apps allowing large file uploads

These are set under WAF Policy → Policy Settings.

parameters.description: Paste a WAF transaction ID from logs or a support ticket to look up the exact request and create an exclusion.
parameters.name: LookupTxnId
parameters.label: Transaction ID

content.json:
## Quick Transaction Lookup
Paste a **Transaction ID** from WAF logs or a support ticket above. This shows all WAF rule events for that specific request so you can review the match details and create an exclusion with one click.\n\n> **Important:** The exclusion will be applied to the WAF policy selected in **Step 1** above. Make sure you selected the correct Application Gateway and listener scope before applying a fix.

> **Tip:** Find the transaction ID in WAF firewall logs (`transactionId` field) or in the Azure portal under Application Gateway > WAF logs.

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == "ApplicationGatewayFirewallLog"
| where TimeGenerated {detectionTime}
| where "{LookupTxnId}" != ""
| extend TxnId = coalesce(tostring(column_ifexists("transactionId_g", "")), tostring(column_ifexists("transactionId_s", "")))
| where TxnId == "{LookupTxnId}"
| where ruleId_s != "0"
| where not(ruleId_s startswith "949") and not(ruleId_s startswith "980") and not(ruleId_s startswith "959")
| extend MatchInfo = coalesce(details_message_s, "")
| extend DataInfo = coalesce(details_data_s, "")
| extend MatchVariable = case(
    MatchInfo has "ARGS_NAMES", "RequestArgKeys",
    MatchInfo has "REQUEST_COOKIES_NAMES", "RequestCookieKeys",
    MatchInfo has "REQUEST_HEADERS_NAMES", "RequestHeaderKeys",
    MatchInfo matches regex @'ARGS_GET[:\.]', "RequestArgValues",
    MatchInfo matches regex @'ARGS_POST[:\.]', "RequestArgValues",
    MatchInfo matches regex @'ARGS[:\.]', "RequestArgValues",
    MatchInfo matches regex @'REQUEST_HEADERS[:\.]', "RequestHeaderValues",
    MatchInfo matches regex @'REQUEST_COOKIES[:\.]', "RequestCookieValues",
    MatchInfo has "REQUEST_BODY", "RequestArgValues",
    MatchInfo has "REQUEST_URI", "DisableRule",
    MatchInfo has "REQUEST_BASENAME", "DisableRule",
    MatchInfo has "REQUEST_FILENAME", "DisableRule",
    MatchInfo has "MULTIPART_STRICT_ERROR", "DisableRule",
    MatchInfo has "REQUEST_METHOD", "DisableRule",
    MatchInfo has "REQUEST_PROTOCOL", "DisableRule",
    MatchInfo has "XML:", "DisableRule",
    DataInfo matches regex @'\[ARGS:', "RequestArgValues",
    DataInfo matches regex @'\[REQUEST_HEADERS:', "RequestHeaderValues",
    DataInfo matches regex @'\[REQUEST_COOKIES:', "RequestCookieValues",
    "")
| extend Selector = case(
    isnotempty(extract(@'(?:ARGS|ARGS_GET|ARGS_POST|ARGS_NAMES|REQUEST_HEADERS|REQUEST_HEADERS_NAMES|REQUEST_COOKIES|REQUEST_COOKIES_NAMES|REQUEST_BODY):([^\s\.\):]+)', 1, MatchInfo)), extract(@'(?:ARGS|ARGS_GET|ARGS_POST|ARGS_NAMES|REQUEST_HEADERS|REQUEST_HEADERS_NAMES|REQUEST_COOKIES|REQUEST_COOKIES_NAMES|REQUEST_BODY):([^\s\.\):]+)', 1, MatchInfo),
    isnotempty(extract(@'\[(?:ARGS|REQUEST_HEADERS|REQUEST_COOKIES):([^\]:\s\]]+)', 1, DataInfo)), extract(@'\[(?:ARGS|REQUEST_HEADERS|REQUEST_COOKIES):([^\]:\s\]]+)', 1, DataInfo),
    "")
| extend ActionType = iff(MatchVariable == "DisableRule", "disableRule", "createExclusion")
// Filter out selectors that are clearly attack payloads
| where MatchVariable == "DisableRule" or isempty(Selector) or (Selector !contains "<" and Selector !contains ">" and Selector !contains "script" and Selector !contains "alert(" and Selector !contains ";" and Selector !contains "/")
| extend NormRuleSetType = case(ruleSetType_s has "OWASP", "OWASP", ruleSetType_s)
| extend LogMatchVariable = coalesce(extract(@'at\s+(\w+)[:\.\s]', 1, MatchInfo), extract(@'\[(\w+):', 1, DataInfo), "")
| project TimeGenerated, ruleId_s, ruleGroup_s, ruleSetVersion_s, NormRuleSetType, action_s, MatchVariable, Selector, ActionType, LogMatchVariable, requestUri_s, clientIp_s, hostname_s, details_message_s, details_data_s
| order by ruleId_s asc
content.noDataMessage: No WAF events found for this transaction ID. Check the ID and time range.
content.title: WAF events for transaction {LookupTxnId}

content.json:
---
## Apply Fix
Select a **Matched** rule row above (not the Blocked row — those are mandatory blocking rules that can't be excluded). The details below show what will be changed.

| Setting | Value |
|---------|-------|
| **Action** | `{LookupActionType}` |
| **Rule ID** | `{LookupRuleId}` |
| **Rule Group** | `{LookupRuleGroup}` |
| **Match Variable** | `{LookupMatchVar}` |
| **Selector** | `{LookupSelector}` |
| **Log Variable** | `{LookupLogMatchVar}` |

armActionContext.description:
**Action:** {LookupActionType}

This will apply a change to WAF policy **{wafPolicyName}**:

| Setting | Value |
|---------|-------|
| Action | {LookupActionType} |
| Rule ID | {LookupRuleId} |
| Rule Group | {LookupRuleGroup} |
| Match Variable | {LookupMatchVar} |
| Selector | {LookupSelector} |

⚠️ This modifies your WAF policy. The change applies immediately.
armActionContext.title: WAF Policy Change

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == "ApplicationGatewayFirewallLog"
| where TimeGenerated {detectionTime}
| where ResourceId == '{ResourceId}' and policyScopeName_s == '{PolicyScope}'
| summarize
    Total = count(),
    Blocked = countif(action_s == "Blocked"),
    Matched = countif(action_s == "Matched"),
    UniqueRules = dcount(ruleId_s),
    UniqueURIs = dcount(requestUri_s),
    UniqueIPs = dcount(clientIp_s)
| extend metrics = pack_array(
    pack("Label", "📊 Total Events", "Value", Total, "Order", 1),
    pack("Label", "🔴 Blocked", "Value", Blocked, "Order", 2),
    pack("Label", "🟡 Matched", "Value", Matched, "Order", 3),
    pack("Label", "📋 Unique Rules", "Value", UniqueRules, "Order", 4),
    pack("Label", "🌐 Unique URIs", "Value", UniqueURIs, "Order", 5),
    pack("Label", "👤 Unique IPs", "Value", UniqueIPs, "Order", 6))
| mv-expand metric = metrics
| evaluate bag_unpack(metric)
| sort by tolong(Order) asc
content.title: Summary

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == "ApplicationGatewayFirewallLog"
| where TimeGenerated {detectionTime}
| where ResourceId == '{ResourceId}' and policyScopeName_s == '{PolicyScope}'
| summarize Count = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), action_s
| render timechart
content.title: WAF events over time by action

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == "ApplicationGatewayFirewallLog"
| where TimeGenerated {detectionTime}
| where ResourceId == '{ResourceId}' and policyScopeName_s == '{PolicyScope}'
| where action_s == "Blocked"
| summarize Count = count() by ruleId_s, ruleGroup_s
| order by Count desc
| take 15
content.title: Top 15 blocking rules

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == "ApplicationGatewayFirewallLog"
| where TimeGenerated {detectionTime}
| where ResourceId == '{ResourceId}' and policyScopeName_s == '{PolicyScope}'
| where action_s == "Blocked"
| summarize Blocks = count(), UniqueRules = dcount(ruleId_s), UniqueURIs = dcount(requestUri_s) by clientIp_s
| order by Blocks desc
| take 20
content.title: Top blocked client IPs

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == "ApplicationGatewayFirewallLog"
| where TimeGenerated {detectionTime}
| where ResourceId == '{ResourceId}' and policyScopeName_s == '{PolicyScope}'
| where action_s == "Blocked"
| summarize Blocks = count(), UniqueRules = dcount(ruleId_s), Rules = make_set(ruleId_s, 10) by requestUri_s
| order by Blocks desc
| take 20
content.title: Top blocked URIs
